description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided toolbox with a two-tone color scheme: a textured red lower body and a smooth, light gray lid. The lid appears to be hinged at the back and features subtle panel lines, suggesting reinforced sections or molded grip areas. On each short end, there is a robust, rectangular handle, likely made of plastic, designed for easy carrying. The front side has a shallow recess, possibly for a latch or grip, while the back side shows two visible hinge plates. The overall construction suggests a durable, insulated plastic shell, typical of toolboxes or portable storage containers used in urban and outdoor environments.
description: A rectangular, red and gray hard-shell toolbox with sturdy side handles and a hinged lid, designed for durability and portability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the shallow latch recess and the smooth, light gray lid atop the red body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular, fold-down handle and the box's elongated shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two metallic hinge plates securing the lid to the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1 with another fold-down handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fold-down plastic handles on each short end; fixed in shape, designed for ergonomic grip and easy carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single front clasp-style latch, likely plastic, integrated into the shallow recess for secure closure; no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied by the box shape; no visible trays, dividers, or external bins.
